name: Durable Range Anchor
description: Standard for capturing a Range and re-resolving it later — the genuinely hard, recurring, unowned problem behind annotation, deep-linking, citations, #:~:text=-style scroll-to-text, and durable test selectors. Serialize a selection to a robust W3C Web Annotation selector bundle (TextQuoteSelector / TextPositionSelector / RangeSelector, adopted wholesale at the wire layer), then re-resolve it against a possibly-changed document with a fuzzy fallback and a first-class orphan state (the Hypothesis / RecogitoJS precedent). The anchorStrategy dimension (quote | position | bundle, default bundle) is homed here. Target-agnostic — reusable far beyond annotation — which is why it is its own standard, not annotation-internal machinery. Ratified in #1408 (Fork 2 split); the annotation intent composes it. The contract is the only lock; the serializer/resolver + fuzzy matcher are impl (Frontier UI).
